name: Astro Corporation
summary: Astro Corporation develops, produces, and operates digital games, systems, and software and hardware for gaming and lottery products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers various self-service betting halls, monitor centers, and lottery games; casino and multi player games; cabinets; and lottery, VLT, and casino management systems. It also provides digital entertainment and casual software machine rental and point of sales customization, as well as product outsourcing services. The company is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
